XAnyGate10.description: 10-channel gate node with per-channel output switches and recursive output enabled by default, using customizable recursive order.

enable_recursive.name: Enable Recursive
enable_recursive.tooltip: Enable recursive output lookup using recursive_order from left to right

recursive_order.name: Recursive Order
recursive_order.tooltip: Recursive order list separated by '-' (example: 1-3-5-7-9 or 5-9-3-7-1). Only 1-10 is allowed and duplicates are forbidden.

0.name: Output 1
0.tooltip: Channel 1 output (None when disabled or input is empty)

1.name: Output 2
1.tooltip: Channel 2 output (None when disabled or input is empty)

2.name: Output 3
2.tooltip: Channel 3 output (None when disabled or input is empty)

3.name: Output 4
3.tooltip: Channel 4 output (None when disabled or input is empty)

4.name: Output 5
4.tooltip: Channel 5 output (None when disabled or input is empty)

5.name: Output 6
5.tooltip: Channel 6 output (None when disabled or input is empty)

6.name: Output 7
6.tooltip: Channel 7 output (None when disabled or input is empty)

7.name: Output 8
7.tooltip: Channel 8 output (None when disabled or input is empty)

8.name: Output 9
8.tooltip: Channel 9 output (None when disabled or input is empty)

9.name: Output 10
9.tooltip: Channel 10 output (None when disabled or input is empty)

10.name: Recursive Output
10.tooltip: First non-None output found using recursive_order when recursive mode is enabled

XAnyToString.description: Converts any input data to a string while passing the original input through to downstream nodes.

anything.name: Any Input
anything.tooltip: Pass-through input. The pass-through output keeps the same data type as this input while also converting the value with Python str()

0.name: Any Output
0.tooltip: Original input data passed through for downstream nodes

1.name: String
1.tooltip: String converted from the input using str()

XDateTimeString.description: DateTime string node that generates formatted datetime strings with placeholders for use with nodes that don't natively support date identifiers.

0.name: Datetime String
0.tooltip: Formatted datetime string

XImageCompare.description: Interactive A/B image comparison with slide, spotlight, blend, and auto ping-pong modes.

image_a.name: Image/Mask A
image_a.tooltip: First image or mask for comparison (optional)

image_b.name: Image/Mask B
image_b.tooltip: Second image or mask for comparison (optional)

save_to_output.name: Save to Output
save_to_output.tooltip: Enable: save to output (persistent). Disabled: temp cache

swap_ab.name: Swap A/B
swap_ab.tooltip: Swap both display and output order of Image/Mask A and B

0.name: A
0.tooltip: Passthrough of A

XKleinRefConditioning.description: Automatically encodes connected reference images and appends reference latents to both positive and negative conditioning chains.

vae.name: VAE
vae.tooltip: VAE used to encode reference images

0.name: Positive Conditioning
0.tooltip: Positive conditioning with reference latents

XMath.description: Mathematical operation node supporting addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, power, and modulo operations with dual output format.

input_a.name: Input A
input_a.tooltip: Input value A (accepts INT or FLOAT, takes priority when use_input_a is enabled)

input_b.name: Input B
input_b.tooltip: Input value B (accepts INT or FLOAT, takes priority when use_input_b is enabled)

use_input_a.name: Use Input A
use_input_a.tooltip: use input value A (input_a takes precedence when enabled, fallbacks to basic_a if not connected to other node)

use_input_b.name: Use Input B
use_input_b.tooltip: use input value B (input_b takes precedence when enabled, fallbacks to basic_b if not connected to other node)

0.name: Integer Result
0.tooltip: Integer result (truncated decimal part towards zero)

XMemoryCleanup.description: Manual cleanup node for optional Python memory cleanup, model/node usage cleanup, and VRAM cache cleanup. All options are disabled by default for safe manual control.

anything.name: Anything
anything.tooltip: Optional pass-through input. Output type automatically matches the connected input type.

cleanup_memory.name: Cleanup Memory
cleanup_memory.tooltip: Run Python garbage collection (gc.collect). Disabled by default.

cleanup_node_usage.name: Cleanup Node Usage
cleanup_node_usage.tooltip: Unload currently loaded models and run model cleanup checks. Disabled by default.

cleanup_vram.name: Cleanup VRAM
cleanup_vram.tooltip: Run VRAM/device cache cleanup (soft_empty_cache). Disabled by default.

0.name: Anything
0.tooltip: Pass-through output (same data type as input)

XResolution.description: Resolution setting node with standard presets, custom scaling, divisible adjustment, and offset support.

preset.name: Preset
preset.tooltip: Resolution preset (used only when image input is not connected; if preset is not Custom, it overrides custom width/height)

image_or_mask.name: Image or Mask
image_or_mask.tooltip: Image or mask input for base resolution (takes priority over preset and custom width/height)

width.name: Custom Width
width.tooltip: Custom resolution width (used only when preset is Custom and image input is not connected)

height.name: Custom Height
height.tooltip: Custom resolution height (used only when preset is Custom and image input is not connected)

divisible_mode.name: Divisible Mode
divisible_mode.tooltip: How to adjust resolution to be divisible: Disabled=no adjustment, Nearest=round to nearest multiple, Up=round up, Down=round down

options.Nearest: Round to nearest multiple (down if remainder≤divisor/2, else up)

divisible.name: Divisible By
divisible.tooltip: Make resolution divisible by this number (set to 1 to disable, common values: 8, 16, 32, 64)

width_offset.name: Width Offset
width_offset.tooltip: Add offset to output width (positive=increase, negative=decrease, default=0)

height_offset.name: Height Offset
height_offset.tooltip: Add offset to output height (positive=increase, negative=decrease, default=0)

0.name: width
0.tooltip: Output resolution width (after preset, scaling, swap, divisible adjustment, and offset)

1.name: height
1.tooltip: Output resolution height (after preset, scaling, swap, divisible adjustment, and offset)

XSeed.description: Generate non-negative seed values with native seed control, then apply max-digit truncation and optional trailing zero-padding.

digits.name: Digit Limit
digits.tooltip: Max output digit limit (1 to 20). Truncation is applied only when seed length exceeds this limit.

pad_to_limit.name: Pad With Zeros
pad_to_limit.tooltip: When enabled, seeds shorter than the digit limit are padded with trailing zeros to the limit length. Because random seeds in the 64-bit range are usually high-digit values, this option is rarely triggered in practice.

seed_value.name: Seed Value
seed_value.tooltip: Base non-negative seed value with native generate control. Final output applies digit-limit rules.

0.name: Seed Int
0.tooltip: Final non-negative integer seed after limit and padding rules.

1.name: xdata Seed
1.tooltip: xdata_seed payload for passing to XDataSave as local history data.

XStringGroup.description: Groups 5 multiline string inputs with customizable separation methods between them.

separation_method_1_2.name: Separation method 1-2
separation_method_1_2.tooltip: Separation method between String 1 and String 2 (none: '', newline: \n, space: ' ', comma: ',', comma_space: ', ', period: '.', period_space: '. ')

separation_method_2_3.name: Separation method 2-3
separation_method_2_3.tooltip: Separation method between String 2 and String 3 (none: '', newline: \n, space: ' ', comma: ',', comma_space: ', ', period: '.', period_space: '. ')

separation_method_3_4.name: Separation method 3-4
separation_method_3_4.tooltip: Separation method between String 3 and String 4 (none: '', newline: \n, space: ' ', comma: ',', comma_space: ', ', period: '.', period_space: '. ')

separation_method_4_5.name: Separation method 4-5
separation_method_4_5.tooltip: Separation method between String 4 and String 5 (none: '', newline: \n, space: ' ', comma: ',', comma_space: ', ', period: '.', period_space: '. ')

0.name: All Strings
0.tooltip: Output of all grouped strings (with separation methods)

1.name: Selected String
1.tooltip: Selected string output based on select_string

XStringWrap.description: Minimal string wrapper node that applies separators before and/or after text based on mode.

enabled.name: Enable Output
enabled.tooltip: Master switch. When disabled, the node outputs an empty string.

apply_mode.name: Apply Mode
apply_mode.tooltip: Separator apply strategy: both=apply prefix and suffix, prefix_only=apply prefix only, suffix_only=apply suffix only.

text.name: Text
text.tooltip: Main text input. If empty, the node outputs an empty string.

0.name: Wrapped Text
0.tooltip: String result generated by the current separator mode.

XAudioGet.description: Load the latest audio sent from XDataHub.

0.name: Audio
0.tooltip: Latest audio received from XDataHub

XAudioSave.description: Audio saving node with WAV/FLAC lossless output, supporting custom filename, subfolder, datetime placeholders, dynamic range compression, loudness normalization, and peak limiting.

enable_multi_level_directory.name: Enable multi-level directory
enable_multi_level_directory.tooltip: Support creating multi-level directories or not. True, subfolders support path separators; False, subfolders do not support path separators.

subfolder.name: Subfolder
subfolder.tooltip: Subfolder name (no path separators allowed), supports datetime placeholders: %Y%, %m%, %d%, %H%, %M%, %S%

format.name: Output Format
format.tooltip: Output file format. WAV keeps float32 master output but does not reliably preserve custom workflow metadata on the current FFmpeg path; FLAC uses lossless compression and supports workflow metadata embedding.

sample_rate.name: Sample Rate
sample_rate.tooltip: Target sample rate for the output audio file

target_lufs.name: Target LUFS
target_lufs.tooltip: Target LUFS value for loudness normalization. Lower values make audio quieter. Default -14.1, Set to -70 to disable.

enable_peak_limiter.name: Enable Peak Limiter
enable_peak_limiter.tooltip: Enable True Peak limiting (broadcast standard, 8x oversampling). When disabled, skips peak limiting.

peak_limit.name: Peak Limit
peak_limit.tooltip: Peak limiting value in dB. Only used when enable_peak_limiter is enabled. Default -1.1, Values below 0 dB prevent clipping.

enable_compression.name: Enable Compression
enable_compression.tooltip: Enable dynamic range compression using acompressor filter. When disabled, skips compression and proceeds directly to LUFS normalization.

compression_mode.name: Compression Mode
compression_mode.tooltip: Compression preset mode. Threshold is automatically calculated based on audio LUFS and target LUFS. Fast: Fast response for voice/podcasts, ratio=3:1. Balanced: Balanced for general use, ratio=2:1. Slow: Smooth for mastering/broadcast, ratio=1.5:1.

use_custom_ratio.name: Use Custom Ratio
use_custom_ratio.tooltip: Enable custom compression ratio to override preset value. When disabled, uses the preset's default ratio.

custom_ratio.name: Custom Ratio
custom_ratio.tooltip: Custom compression ratio (1.0 to 20.0). Only used when use_custom_ratio is enabled. Lower values = lighter compression, higher values = stronger compression. Set ratio to 1.0 to disable compression (pass-through mode).

0.name: Processed Audio
0.tooltip: Audio after resampling, compression, loudness normalization, and peak limiting

1.name: Saved Path
1.tooltip: Saved file path relative to ComfyUI output directory

XDataSave.description: Save xdata records to SQLite DB files under the project XDataSaved folder with Custom/Seed/String save types, 500-record rotation, a 120-character header limit, and a 64KB per-record limit.

xdata_input.name: xdata Input
xdata_input.tooltip: Composite xdata input. Currently supports xdata_seed and xdata_string.

save_type.name: Save Type
save_type.tooltip: Save type: Custom requires a custom filename; Seed always writes to seed_data.db; String always writes to string_data.db.

custom_filename_input.name: Custom Filename Input
custom_filename_input.tooltip: Optional custom filename input port. When connected, it takes priority over the text field.

custom_filename_text.name: Custom Filename
custom_filename_text.tooltip: Fallback filename for Custom save type. Default is empty; missing filename raises an explicit configuration error.

extra_header_input.name: Extra Header Input
extra_header_input.tooltip: Optional extra header input port. When connected, it takes priority over the text field.

extra_header_text.name: Extra Header Text
extra_header_text.tooltip: Fallback extra header text. Saved together with the actual timestamp in each record; header length must not exceed 120 characters and each record must not exceed 64KB.

enable_save.name: Enable Save
enable_save.tooltip: Enable or disable file writing. When disabled, this node returns a skipped status.

0.name: Save Status
0.tooltip: Save execution status message.

1.name: Save Path
1.tooltip: Path relative to project root. Empty string when save is skipped.

XImageGet.description: Load images from XDataHub with X Mask Editor support.

output_placeholder.name: Placeholder Black Image
output_placeholder.tooltip: Output a 1x1 black placeholder image when no image is available

x_mask_ref.name: Mask Ref
x_mask_ref.tooltip: Separate mask file reference saved by X Mask Editor

x_paint_ref.name: Paint Ref
x_paint_ref.tooltip: Separate paint layer reference saved by X Mask Editor

x_transform_state.name: Transform State
x_transform_state.tooltip: Rotation and flip state saved by X Mask Editor

0.name: Image
0.tooltip: Latest image received from XDataHub

1.name: Mask
1.tooltip: Mask loaded from the separate X Mask Editor mask file

XImageResize.description: Fully automatic image scaling node with intelligent landscape/portrait/square detection, multiple interpolation methods, and aspect ratio preservation.

resize_settings_in.name: Resize Settings In
resize_settings_in.tooltip: Optional settings input. Connect upstream XImageResize settings output to pass chain settings into this node.

use_passed_settings.name: Use Passed Settings
use_passed_settings.tooltip: When enabled and settings input is connected, this node uses upstream settings for resize calculation. When disabled, this node uses local panel settings, but chain settings still pass through to downstream nodes.

output_resize_settings.name: Output Resize Settings
output_resize_settings.tooltip: When disabled, resize settings output becomes empty, equivalent to leaving the settings cable unconnected.

scale_mode.name: Interpolation
scale_mode.tooltip: Select interpolation algorithm for scaling images: Nearest-exact=fastest, Bilinear=fast & medium quality, Area=best for downsampling, Bicubic=medium speed & high quality, Lanczos=slow & highest quality. For MASK input, Nearest-exact is recommended to avoid edge drift.

options.Nearest-exact: Nearest Exact (fastest, pixel-perfect, ideal for pixel art)
options.Bicubic: Bicubic (medium speed, high quality, good for upscaling)

edge_mode.name: Scale Mode
edge_mode.tooltip: Select scaling mode: Long=long edge, Short=short edge, Megapixels=target pixels, Scale Multiplier=scale by multiplier

options.Long: Long Edge (width for landscape, height for portrait)
options.Short: Short Edge (height for landscape, width for portrait)
options.Scale Multiplier: Scale Multiplier (scale by multiplier, ignores target_edge)

resize_condition.name: Resize Condition
resize_condition.tooltip: Resize trigger condition (applies only to Long/Short/Megapixels): Always=always resize, Only if Larger=resize only when image is larger than target, Only if Smaller=resize only when image is smaller than target. Ignored in Scale Multiplier mode. If the condition is not met, resizing is skipped, but divisible and offset are still applied.

target_edge.name: Target Edge
target_edge.tooltip: Target edge length in pixels (ignored in megapixels mode)

megapixels.name: Megapixels
megapixels.tooltip: Only used in Megapixels mode as target pixel count (must be >0)

scale_multiplier.name: Scale Multiplier
scale_multiplier.tooltip: Scale multiplier (only used in Scale Multiplier mode, range: 0.1-10.0)

divisible_mode.name: Divisible Mode
divisible_mode.tooltip: How to adjust resolution to be divisible: Disabled=no adjustment, Nearest=round to nearest multiple, Up=round up, Down=round down

options.Nearest: Round to nearest multiple (down if remainder≤divisor/2, else up)

divisible.name: Divisible By
divisible.tooltip: Make resolution divisible by this number (set to 1 to disable, common values: 8, 16, 32, 64)

width_offset.name: Width Offset
width_offset.tooltip: Add offset to output width (positive=increase, negative=decrease, default=0)

height_offset.name: Height Offset
height_offset.tooltip: Add offset to output height (positive=increase, negative=decrease, default=0)

0.name: Processed Data
0.tooltip: Scaled image or mask (batch uses one unified target size)

3.name: Resize Settings Out
3.tooltip: Outputs chain settings for downstream nodes. If valid upstream settings exist, this output keeps forwarding the chain-origin settings.

XImageSave.description: Advanced image/mask saving node with custom filename, subfolder support, and datetime placeholders.

subfolder.name: Subfolder
subfolder.tooltip: Subfolder name (no path separators allowed), supports datetime placeholders: %Y%, %m%, %d%, %H%, %M%, %S%

enable_preview.name: Enable Preview
enable_preview.tooltip: Show image preview on this node after saving when enabled

0.name: Image or Mask
0.tooltip: Original input image or mask (passed through)

1.name: Saved Path
1.tooltip: Saved file path relative to ComfyUI output directory

XLatentLoad.description: Latent loading node supporting both input port and file loading with automatic format detection.

latent_input.name: Latent
latent_input.tooltip: Input latent from another node (higher priority than file loading)

latent_file.name: Latent File
latent_file.tooltip: Latent file to load from ComfyUI output directory

0.name: Latent
0.tooltip: Loaded latent tensor (from input port or file)

XLatentSave.description: Latent saving node with metadata support and custom filename.

subfolder.name: Subfolder
subfolder.tooltip: Subfolder name (no path separators allowed), supports datetime placeholders: %Y%, %m%, %d%, %H%, %M%, %S%

0.name: Latent
0.tooltip: Input latent (passed through)

1.name: Saved Path
1.tooltip: Saved file path relative to ComfyUI output directory

XLoraGet.description: Receives a LoRA list from XDataHub Lora cards and applies them to the model and CLIP in order.

model.name: Model
model.tooltip: Base model to apply LoRAs to

clip.name: CLIP
clip.tooltip: Optional CLIP input. When not connected, Clip strength is forced to 0.

0.name: Model
0.tooltip: Model with LoRAs applied

2.name: Trigger Words
2.tooltip: Enabled trigger words from all active LoRAs

3.name: LoRA Info
3.tooltip: Summary of applied LoRA names, model strength, and Clip strength

XMarkdownSave.description: Markdown saving node with header/main/footer string input priority, multiline textbox fallback, explicit separators before and after the main content, newline count validation, custom filename, subfolder, and datetime placeholders.

subfolder.name: Subfolder
subfolder.tooltip: Subfolder name (no path separators allowed), supports datetime placeholders: %Y%, %m%, %d%, %H%, %M%, %S%

header_input.name: Header Input
header_input.tooltip: Optional header string input port. When connected, this input takes priority over header_text.

header_text.name: Header Text
header_text.tooltip: Additional multiline text prepended before the main content. Do not rely on trailing blank lines; use the separator controls below for stable newlines.

before_main_separator.name: Before Main Separator
before_main_separator.tooltip: Separator inserted between header_text and the main content. none = no separator, newline = insert newline characters.

before_main_newline_count.name: Before Main Newline Count
before_main_newline_count.tooltip: Only used when Before Main Separator is newline. Must be greater than or equal to 1.

main_text_input.name: Main Text Input
main_text_input.tooltip: Optional main content string input port. When connected, this input takes priority over text_content.

text_content.name: Text Content
text_content.tooltip: Fallback multiline textbox content used only when main_text_input is not connected.

after_main_separator.name: After Main Separator
after_main_separator.tooltip: Separator inserted between the main content and footer_text. none = no separator, newline = insert newline characters.

after_main_newline_count.name: After Main Newline Count
after_main_newline_count.tooltip: Only used when After Main Separator is newline. Must be greater than or equal to 1.

footer_input.name: Footer Input
footer_input.tooltip: Optional footer string input port. When connected, this input takes priority over footer_text.

footer_text.name: Footer Text
footer_text.tooltip: Additional multiline text appended after the main content. Do not rely on leading blank lines; use the separator controls above for stable newlines.

0.name: Saved Content
0.tooltip: Final complete string written into the markdown file, available for downstream nodes.

1.name: Saved Path
1.tooltip: Saved file path relative to ComfyUI output directory

XStringGet.description: Load the latest text sent from XDataHub.

text_value.name: Content
text_value.tooltip: Latest body text received from XDataHub

title_value.name: Header
title_value.tooltip: Latest header text received from XDataHub

0.name: Content
0.tooltip: Latest body text received from XDataHub

1.name: Header
1.tooltip: Latest header text received from XDataHub

XVideoGet.description: Load the latest video sent from XDataHub.

0.name: Video
0.tooltip: Latest video received from XDataHub

XVideoSave.description: Video saving node with H.265 encoding support and custom parameters.

subfolder.name: Subfolder
subfolder.tooltip: Subfolder name (no path separators allowed), supports datetime placeholders: %Y%, %m%, %d%, %H%, %M%, %S%

crf.name: Video CRF
crf.tooltip: Integer quality parameter (0=lossless, 40=worst quality). Higher CRF means lower quality with smaller file size.

preset.name: Encoding Preset
preset.tooltip: Encoding speed/compression tradeoff. Faster presets encode quickly but with larger files. Slower presets provide better compression but take longer.

container.name: Container
container.tooltip: Output container format. MKV prioritizes lossless compatibility; MP4 prioritizes ComfyUI web metadata compatibility.

XWorkflowSave.description: Saves ComfyUI workflow as JSON file, supporting three save modes (Auto auto-detect, Native mode, Prompt+FullWorkflow combined mode), custom filename, subfolder, and datetime placeholders.

anything.name: Any Input
anything.tooltip: Optional pass-through input for workflow connection. This input is not processed, only used to link the node into your workflow. The pass-through output follows the connected input data type. Node works without any input.

save_mode.name: Save Mode
save_mode.tooltip: Save mode: Auto (auto-detect, prefer Prompt+FullWorkflow, fallback to Native if frontend extension not loaded), Native (use extra_pnginfo to save native workflow format, compatible with ComfyUI web), Prompt+FullWorkflow (save prompt + full workflow, requires frontend API data)

filename_prefix.name: Filename Prefix
filename_prefix.tooltip: Filename prefix, supports datetime placeholders: %Y%(year), %m%(month), %d%(day), %H%(hour), %M%(minute), %S%(second). Default: ComfyUI_%Y%-%m%-%d%_%H%-%M%-%S%

subfolder.name: Subfolder
subfolder.tooltip: Subfolder name (path separators / and \ not allowed), supports datetime placeholders: %Y%, %m%, %d%, %H%, %M%, %S%. Default: Workflows

0.name: Any Output
0.tooltip: Pass through the input data to downstream nodes

1.name: Workflow Info
1.tooltip: Workflow information summary including save status, node count, data overview and file path. Useful for debugging and verification.
